name: Fisherman's Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Press 2 cups of mashed potatoes into a 9-inch glass pie plate to form the pie shell.
2. In a saucepan, bring cod and water to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Add catfish and shrimp, then simmer until the fish flakes and the shrimp are cooked through. Drain off the cooking liquid and reserve it.
3. Flake the cooked fish and combine with crab meat. Place the mixture in the potato shell and set aside.
4. Melt butter in a skillet. Add flour and stir constantly until no lumps remain. Do not brown the flour.
5. Gradually add Parmesan cheese and half of the reserved cooking liquid, stirring constantly until smooth and creamy.
6. Add salt, Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and parsley to the mixture. Stir well to combine.
7. Pour the sauce over the seafood mixture in the potato shell.
8. Place the remaining mashed potatoes in a pastry bag. Pipe around the edge of the pie, forming a ring with a rosette in the center.
9. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese evenly over the top of the potatoes.
10. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
